settings.networkError: Network error. Please try again later.

settings.feedbackSendError: Could not send the message. Please try again.

video.creditsNote: Credits are consumed when generation starts, regardless of outcome.
video.promptPlaceholder: The character walks confidently, cinematic slow motion...
video.setupSubtitle: Define the basics of your video project.
video.setupDescHint: What is this video about? What's the core message?
video.setupDescPlaceholder: Describe the goal of this video in a few sentences...
video.sceneBuilderSubtitle: Divide your video into scenes. Each scene has its own prompt, style, and duration.
video.scenePromptHint: Describe what happens in this scene visually.
video.scenePromptPlaceholder: Describe the visual content in detail. What do we see? What happens?
video.scenePromptMinError: Prompt must be at least 10 characters
video.sceneNarrationHint: Optional — text to be spoken in this scene
video.sceneNarrationPlaceholder: Optional: add narration or voiceover text for this scene...
video.sceneMinCharsTooltip: Each scene needs at least 10 characters in the prompt
video.styleToneSubtitle: Define the emotional tone and visual direction for the entire video.
video.styleToneInfoBody: Tone affects how the AI interprets transitions, pacing, and visual choices. Individual scene visual styles take precedence but the overall tone shapes the final edit. Advanced style options (color grade, music, typography) will be available in a future update.
video.reviewSubtitle: Confirm your project settings before starting generation.
video.reviewGenericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

create.generationWait: Generation usually takes 3–6 minutes. If you close this page, the video will appear in your History when ready.
create.generationTimeout: Generation is taking longer than expected. You can close this page — the video will appear in your History automatically.
create.creditsOnSuccess: Credits are only charged upon successful completion.
create.videoDesc: Generate a video from text or from an image
create.videoRefHint: Upload an image or paste a URL to convert it to video
create.videoClickUpload: Click to upload image or video
create.videoExtendHint: Paste the URL of a generated video to continue the scene
create.videoExtendPlaceholder: https://... URL of the video to extend
create.videoPromptHint: Describe the movement and action in the video
create.videoErrorType: Only images or videos are allowed
create.promptDesc: Describe your idea — Fixora transforms it into a professional prompt
create.promptHeroTitle: What do you want the AI to imagine?
create.promptHeroSub: Write in any language — Fixora optimizes the prompt while respecting your language.
create.promptIdeaHint: Write in English or any language
create.promptIdeaPlaceholder: A samurai warrior meditating in the rain...
create.promptImageAttached: Image attached — Fixora will analyze it
create.promptRefHint: Optional — Fixora will analyze the image along with your idea
create.promptImageNote: ✓ Fixora will analyze this image when optimizing your prompt
create.promptResultNote: The AI respected your language. Use it directly in Generate Image or Generate Video.
create.promptErrorFormat: Unsupported format. Use PNG, JPG, WEBP, or GIF.
create.cloneDesc: Animate your AI character with the movement from a real video
create.cloneCharHint: Image of the character to animate
create.cloneMotionHint: Video with the movement to apply to the Avatar
create.clonePromptHint: What do you want your character to do with those movements
create.clonePromptPlaceholder: My strawberry character dancing energetically, adopting exactly the movements from the video…
create.cloneErrorImageType: Only images are allowed (JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC)
create.cloneErrorVideoType: Only videos are allowed (MP4, MOV, WebM)
create.cloneErrorFailed: Could not generate the video. No credits were charged.
create.adDesc: Create an advertising video with your character and product
create.adCharHint: Image of the person who will promote the product
create.adProductHint: Image of the product to promote
create.adProductNameHint: E.g. Noir Perfume, Air Max Sneakers, Facial Cream...
create.adErrorImageType: Only images are allowed (JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC)
create.adErrorTimeout: Generation took too long. Check your History in a few minutes.
create.adErrorFailed: Generation failed. Your credits will be refunded.
create.multiDesc: Swap 4 characters following the same movement (5s each)
create.multiMotionHint: The video that all characters will clone
create.multiProcessingMsg: We are processing the 4 characters simultaneously. This usually takes 4–8 minutes. Credits will only be charged for parts that complete successfully.

studio.title: Studio
studio.desc: Create mini films with consistent characters
studio.emptyDesc: Create your first mini film with consistent characters in every scene.
studio.videosGenerated: {n, plural, one {# video generated} other {# videos generated}}
studio.newDesc: Define your character and the name of your mini film
studio.charMainDesc: This image will be used as a visual reference in all scenes to maintain character consistency.
studio.charUploadHint: Image of the character that will appear in all scenes
studio.seriesNameHint: E.g. Luna's Adventures, My Story in Paris...
studio.seriesDescHint: Optional — general context for your mini film
studio.seriesDescPlaceholder: Write a brief description of the story (optional)...

stylePrompts.corte-transversal: Transform the main subject into a clean educational cross-section diagram on a white background. Show a believable layered interior section. Make it look like a scientific textbook or museum graphic, prioritizing clarity and precision.
stylePrompts.infografia: Create an educational infographic of the main subject on a dark background. Show its internal anatomy with clearly color-coded zones. Scientific style of Nature magazine or natural history museum.
stylePrompts.maquillaje: Create a professional makeup visual guide in portrait format. Show facial zones with applied techniques: foundation, contour, highlighter, eyes and lips. Beauty magazine editorial style.
stylePrompts.hiperrealista: Hyperrealistic photography with natural light, soft bokeh and authentic texture. Capture a genuine moment with depth of field and natural color.
stylePrompts.3d-pixar: 3D character in Pixar style with warm studio lighting, expressive rounded shapes and vibrant colors. Cinematic production render.
stylePrompts.fantasia: Epic fantasy scene with dramatic lighting, volumetric light rays and mystical atmosphere. Grand scale with jewel tone color palette.
stylePrompts.comic: Comic illustration with bold black ink, Ben-Day dot patterns and vibrant flat colors. Dynamic pose in classic Marvel style.
stylePrompts.avatar-3d: Stylized 3D avatar with neutral studio background, balanced lighting and expressive character design. Professional quality render.
stylePrompts.interiores: Interior design photography with golden window light, carefully staged furniture and warm textures. Architectural Digest magazine standard.
stylePrompts.paisaje: Natural landscape photography at golden hour with wide dynamic range, sharp foreground and dramatic sky. National Geographic quality.
stylePrompts.surrealista: Impossible surrealist scene rendered with photographic realism. Dramatic scale juxtapositions with dreamlike lighting in the style of Dalí or Magritte.
stylePrompts.estatua: Museum sculpture photography with dramatic chiaroscuro lighting. Aged marble or bronze texture with macro detail.
stylePrompts.chibi: Chibi sticker on pure white background, clean bold outline and bright flat colors. Simplified anatomy with large head and expressive eyes.
stylePrompts.vintage: 1950s-60s vintage poster with limited flat color palette, aged paper texture and period typography.
stylePrompts.mini-yo: Funko Pop style collectible figure on neutral studio background, soft matte plastic and characteristic large head proportions.
stylePrompts.dark-fantasy: Dark fantasy concept art with dramatic rim lighting, epic light rays and dark jewel tone palette. Blizzard Entertainment quality.
stylePrompts.acuarela: Traditional watercolor painting with wet-on-wet color bleeding, natural pigment transparency and handmade paper texture.
stylePrompts.producto: Commercial product photography on white or gradient background, 3-point softbox lighting and ultra-sharp detail. Luxury advertising standard.
stylePrompts.espacio: Photorealistic space visualization with luminous nebula, reflective cosmic dust and planetary detail. Hubble or James Webb quality.
stylePrompts.mejora-fotos: Enhance photo quality while preserving authenticity: natural light balance, noise reduction and accurate skin tones. Natural professional retouching.
